speaker: speaker1
text: Ah , thank you.Please bring your luggage here for inspection .

speaker: speaker1
text: It's just a regular inspection . Do you have anything to declare ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I've got 6 packets of cigarettes and 2 bottles of champagne.Besides , I have two cameras , one is for my own use , and the other is a gift .

speaker: speaker1
text: Well , the cigarettes and the champagne are not in excess of the duty-free allowance . But according to our law , each passenger is allowed only one camera duty-free.You ' ll have to pay duty for the other one .

speaker: speaker2
text: Ok . Where shall I pay duty for it ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Please wait a minute . I'll make out the duty memo ... Here you are.Take this and pay to the woman over there .

speaker: speaker2
text: I've paid for it . Here's the receipt .

speaker: speaker1
text: Very well . I hope you ' ll enjoy your stay in America .
